category_sources: Official GitHub organization describes Transmission as a fast, easy, free BitTorrent client.
source_facts.description says it is a lightweight BitTorrent client.
display_name_sources: Official repository is the Transmission BitTorrent client project.
source_facts.name is transmission-cli and executables are Transmission command-line tools.
docs_sources: Official Transmission repository contains a docs directory.
source_facts.homepage points to the official transmissionbt.com project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/transmission/transmission; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list transmission-cli, transmission-daemon, transmission-remote, and related CLI tools.
